message:
feat(connectors): ASUPERSYNC tokio→fcp-async-core migration across 5 connectors

Anthropic connector:
- tokio::time::sleep → fcp_async_core::time::sleep
- tokio_stream::Stream → futures_util::Stream
- #[tokio::test] → #[fcp_async_core::runtime::test] (5 tests)

Discord connector:
- Hand-rolled retry loops in api.rs replaced with RetryLoop::execute()
- ConnectorErrorMapping impl on DiscordError with from_async_error,
  is_retryable, retry_after
- ConnectorRuntime + HttpRetryConfig replace raw retry fields
- #[tokio::test] → #[fcp_async_core::runtime::test]

Telegram connector:
- tokio::time::sleep → fcp_async_core::time::sleep (4 call sites)
- #[tokio::test] → #[fcp_async_core::runtime::test]

Twitter connector:
- tokio::time::sleep → fcp_async_core::time::sleep (4 call sites)
- #[tokio::test] → #[fcp_async_core::runtime::test]

VectorDB connector:
- tokio runtime references migrated to fcp-async-core

OpenAI connector:
- fcp-conformance dep added to Cargo.toml

Migration framework (fcp-sdk/src/migration.rs):
- Doc comment lint fixes (AsyncSuperSync → backtick-quoted)
- RetryLoop: unwrap_or_else for exhausted budget instead of bare expect
- Backoff delay computation simplified with map_or + let-else
- delay_ms cast uses u64::try_from with MAX fallback

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
